name: Mystic Macrocarpa Seed
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>幻</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>げん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>妖</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>よう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>種</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しゅ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ミトラ
desc: Cannot be used as a Synchro Material Monster, except for the Synchro Summon of an EARTH monster. You can target 1 EARTH monster on the field; reduce its Level by 1. You can use the effect of "Mystic Macrocarpa Seed" up to twice per turn.
